violations.text: Garbage disposal located in the dish rinse area before the dishwasher remains in poor repair. Food debris does not go down properly resulting in back-up. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

Garbage disposal located in the dish rinse area before the dishwasher was not in good repair. Food debris does not go down properly resulting in back-up. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025

The dishwasher is not in good repair and is not currently being used. Employees wash, rinse, and sanitize using the 3-bay sink. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

Dishwasher observed in poor repair. It is not currently in service. 3-bay sink is currently being used to wash, rinse, and sanitize. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria (between the two doors at the top and at the bottom), are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

The floor and wall junctures behind the dishwasher do not have coving. A section of the wall is missing in this area, and concrete hole observed. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the doors and at bottom, center. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets of the milk storage coolers were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

Plexiglass observed bolted to the wall near the dishwasher. Black residue observed between the plexiglass and the wall. This area is not cleanable. Plexiglass must be removed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

The floor and wall junctures behind the dishwasher area do not have coving. Hole observed at the bottom of the wall where wall has crumbled. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Wall is to be fixed and proper coving installed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

The dishwasher is not in good repair. There is a leak and it is not currently functioning. 3-bay sink is being used to wash, rinse, and sanitize. Dishwasher must be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

A piece of plexiglass observed in the dishwasher area with black residue observed between the plexiglass and wall. This area is not cleanable. Floors, walls, and ceilings must be smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
